#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <stdexcept> // for std::runtime_error

std::vector<uint8_t> read_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor from the source_buffer (with const_cast)
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(const_cast<std::vector<uint8_t>&>(source_buffer));

    // Check if the buffer has enough data
    if (adaptor.size() < bytes_to_read) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Insufficient data in buffer");
    }

    // Create a destination vector and read the data
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_read);
    adaptor.read(dest.data(), bytes_to_read);

    return dest;
}

void write_buffer_data(std::vector<uint8_t>& dest_buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_data) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor from the dest_buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(dest_buffer);

    // Write the source_data to the dest_buffer
    adaptor.write(source_data.data(), source_data.size());
}
```

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the header value
    buffer.write(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    // Write the data array
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    
    // Read the header value
    buffer.read(&result.header, sizeof(result.header));
    
    // Read the data array of specified length
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    buffer.read(result.data.data(), data_length);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the entire vector data to the buffer
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a vector to store the read data
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_read);
    // Read data from the buffer into the vector
    buffer.read(result.data(), bytes_to_read);
    // Return the vector containing the read data
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool check_can_write_seek(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.can_write_seek();
}

void seek_write_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, hexi::buffer_seek direction, std::size_t offset) {
    buffer.write_seek(direction, offset);
}

void update_header_at_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t header_value) {
    // Write the initial header (0) at position 0
    uint32_t initial_header = 0;
    buffer.write(&initial_header, sizeof(initial_header));

    // Write 10 bytes of zeros as body data
    std::vector<std::byte> body(10, std::byte{0});
    buffer.write(body.data(), body.size());

    // Total bytes written: 4 (header) + 10 (body) = 14
    // Seek backward by 14 to return to position 0
    buffer.write_seek(hexi::buffer_seek::sk_backward, 14);

    // Write the new header value
    buffer.write(&header_value, sizeof(header_value));
}
```

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    return writer.write_varint(value);
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    return static_cast<T>(reader.read_varint<std::size_t>());
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::byte> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);

    encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    T decoded_value = decode_varint<T>(reader);

    return original_value == decoded_value;
}
```</answer>
